mainEntity.name: What accounting software do you use?

acceptedAnswer.text: We work with Tally Prime, Zoho Books, QuickBooks Online, and Xero. If you have an existing system, we adapt to it. For new setups, we recommend the best fit based on your business size, GST requirements, and reporting needs.

mainEntity.name: How much does bookkeeping cost in Chennai?

acceptedAnswer.text: Monthly bookkeeping starts from Rs 5,000/month for small businesses (up to 100 transactions). Pricing scales with transaction volume, number of bank accounts, and reporting complexity. Contact +91-99622 60333 for a customised quote.

mainEntity.name: Can you handle bookkeeping for my e-commerce business?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. We handle e-commerce bookkeeping including marketplace reconciliation (Amazon, Flipkart), TCS credit tracking, multi-state GST implications, and return/refund accounting. E-commerce requires specialised treatment that general bookkeepers often miss.
